summary: While the PET Technologist role offers the ideal daytime schedule and lack of on-call requirements you prioritize, it presents a critical mismatch with your cognitive strengths. The position is one of the most math-heavy technologist roles and requires rapid, high-stakes analytical reasoning regarding radioactive decay, which directly conflicts with your struggles in those areas. This fundamental mismatch, combined with high regulatory stress and emotional intensity, would likely compromise your wellbeing and lead to burnout despite the excellent work-life balance.
